title: Multi-Seed Competitive Epoch — SeedCompetitionOrchestrator

invariants_introduced.description: No seed promoted without competitive ranking of all candidates in epoch window
Fitness ranking is deterministic — equal inputs produce identical rank orderings
GovernanceGate evaluates all candidates before any single candidate advances
SeedCompetitionEpochEvent written to LineageLedgerV2 before any promotion

notes: Track A core complete. Aponi dashboard panel (COMP-VIS-0) deferred to post-merge iteration per plan.
